name: Bank of England Bank Rate
notes: T2 fallback for FRED BOERUKM (frozen 2016-08-05). BoE IADB direct CSV via _iadb-fromshowcolumns.asp; series IUDBEDR is the canonical Bank Rate. Wired §3.1 Stage D 2026-04-30.

name: Sterling Overnight Index Average (SONIA)
notes: BoE IADB IUDSOIA — overnight unsecured sterling lending rate. Tracks Bank Rate closely; useful as short-end of the UK rate curve. Wired §3.1 Stage F follow-on 2026-05-01.

name: UK Gilt Par Yield (Short tenor)
notes: BoE IADB IUDSNPY — short-tenor nominal par yield on UK government gilts (probe value 4.48% — appears to be 5Y or thereabouts; verify exact tenor against BoE yield-curve docs). Wired §3.1 Stage F follow-on 2026-05-01.

name: UK Gilt Par Yield (Medium tenor)
notes: BoE IADB IUDMNPY — medium-tenor nominal par yield on UK government gilts (probe value 4.95% — appears to be 10-15Y; verify tenor). Wired §3.1 Stage F follow-on 2026-05-01.

name: UK Gilt Par Yield (Long tenor)
notes: BoE IADB IUDLNPY — long-tenor nominal par yield on UK government gilts (probe value 5.46% — appears to be ~25Y; verify tenor). Wired §3.1 Stage F follow-on 2026-05-01.

name: UK Gilt Zero-Coupon Yield (Medium tenor)
notes: BoE IADB IUDMNZC — medium-tenor zero-coupon nominal gilt yield (probe value 5.04%). Companion to IUDMNPY for term-structure analysis. Wired §3.1 Stage F follow-on 2026-05-01.

name: UK Gilt Zero-Coupon Yield (Long tenor)
notes: BoE IADB IUDLNZC — long-tenor zero-coupon nominal gilt yield (probe value 5.72%). Wired §3.1 Stage F follow-on 2026-05-01.

name: UK M2 Money Supply (BoE EMU M2 aggregate, level)
notes: §2.B B1 (2026-07-14) — UK broad-money coverage. BoE IADB LPMVWYH = 'UK estimate of the EMU M2 aggregate' (MFI sterling + all-FX M2 liabilities to private+public sectors, amounts outstanding, NSA). Verified live 2026-07-14: 2026-04 = 3,201,347 £mn. NOTE: this is a LEVEL (£mn), unlike the ECB/BoJ/NBS YoY siblings EZ_M3/JPN_M2/CHN_M2 — BoE publishes the outstanding stock, not a 12-month growth rate; a YoY view is derivable downstream. Data-layer coverage row for regime-AA; no calculator consumes it. sources/boe.py needs no change.
